goal: Preserve old Work thumbnail fallback semantics with write-time PublicThumbnailUrl computation while keeping public read paths fast.
changed: Refreshed PublicThumbnailUrl on Work video add/confirm/HLS/delete/reorder mutations.
Added WorkVideoCommandStore asset URL lookup for strict resolver-equivalence fallback.
Added integration and Postgres contract tests for fallback equivalence and backfill.
notChanged: No request-time resolver added to public Work query paths.
No runtime nginx or DB pool changes.

validations.name: diff guard for pageSize=1, seeded targets, cache workaround

validations.reason: No running compose services were present.

risks: Admin video mutations add asset lookup and conditional video loading, intentionally off the public hot path.
Backfill only covers common quoted img src patterns; future writes use the C# resolver.
Runtime load test should be rerun after CI/deployment to quantify p95 and GC impact.
recommendation: Push PR to dev, verify CI, deploy/promote, then rerun realistic Real Backend Test with pageSize=12 and current public read targets.
